nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=120 beats='Priya realises the school trip left without her and the Coral Bay Aquarium has locked its doors for the night; a note in her pocket, the creased blueprint, hints at the founder's sunken exhibit left behind; three ways lead off the atrium in the dark'>>

choices.label: Slip into the Shark Tunnel.
Head for the Reef Wing.
Try the old Ledger Room downstairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Shark Tunnel glitters under low security lights; a huge shark tank sits crooked on its plinth, and somewhere a faint sonar ping starts up'>>

choices.label: Study a huge shark tank.
Follow a faint sonar ping toward a panel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='a huge shark tank has been opened and closed in a hurry; a smudged viewing pane and a tiny tag fallen behind it both look like they were disturbed recently, maybe by whoever hid the founder's secret'>>

choices.label: Look under a smudged viewing pane.
Read a tiny tag fallen behind it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='under a smudged viewing pane Priya finds a scratched silver anchor mark matching the one on the creased blueprint; it points toward a maintenance tunnel'>>

choices.label: Follow silver anchor mark to a maintenance tunnel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a tiny tag fallen behind it is an old exhibit label in the founder's spidery hand, with a single word underlined that also marks a door on the creased blueprint; it draws her toward a maintenance tunnel'>>

choices.label: Head for a maintenance tunnel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='a maintenance tunnel smells of dust and floor polish; at its end a small sealed hatch has a keyhole shaped like silver anchor mark, but no key in sight, only a loose floor grate'>>

choices.label: Pry up a loose floor grate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='a faint sonar ping is a motion sensor blinking amber; the night watchman's torch beam swings at the far end of the Shark Tunnel, sweeping closer'>>

choices.label: Duck behind a plinth as the night watchman passes.
Freeze in the open and hope.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='crouched behind a plinth, Priya waits until the torch beam moves on; when the night watchman's footsteps fade she spots a maintenance tunnel left ajar'>>

choices.label: Slip into a maintenance tunnel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Reef Wing is all long shadows and painted eyes; a huge coral pillar stands open-lidded, and a faded exhibit chart shows the museum as it was a hundred years ago'>>

choices.label: Examine a huge coral pillar.
Trace a faded exhibit chart.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the cracked lid is heavier than it looks and sits slightly off; nearby a shell display has one empty velvet dent, as if a piece was borrowed and never returned'>>

choices.label: Peek under the cracked lid.
Check a shell display.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='under the cracked lid, tucked in cotton wool, is a silver anchor mark twin to the one on the creased blueprint; a draught tugs from a narrow walkway'>>

choices.label: Follow the draught to a narrow walkway.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a shell display's empty dent is labelled in the founder's hand; a thin arrow scratched into the case points toward a narrow walkway'>>

choices.label: Take the arrow's direction to a narrow walkway.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='a narrow walkway is bare except for another small sealed hatch with a keyhole shaped like silver anchor mark; a fire bucket of sand and old tools sits beside it, one loose ceiling panel rocking underfoot'>>

choices.label: Lift one loose ceiling panel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='a faded exhibit chart shows a wing that is not on any modern floor plan; a spare flashlight hangs on a bracket, and beyond a velvet rope The Curtained Tank Room beckons'>>

choices.label: Grab a spare flashlight and press on.
Duck under the rope into The Curtained Tank Room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a spare flashlight in hand, Priya follows a faded exhibit chart's forgotten wing to a narrow walkway she has not seen, where another small sealed hatch marked with silver anchor mark waits'>>

choices.label: Approach another small sealed hatch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the old Ledger Room smells of old paper; a dusty guest register lies open on a lectern, and beyond the reading lamps the back archives fade into total dark'>>

choices.label: Open a dusty guest register.
Push into the back archives.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='a dusty guest register's last century of names ends abruptly; a card catalogue and a jammed side drawer both seem to hold what the founder filed away before the Coral Bay Aquarium forgot him'>>

choices.label: Check a card catalogue.
Try a jammed side drawer.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='an out-of-place catalogue card is out of order, marked with the same silver anchor mark; it references a low locker deep in the back archives'>>

choices.label: Follow an out-of-place catalogue card into the back archives.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a jammed side drawer holds a folded chart with one tank circled; the circle matches a silver anchor mark on the creased blueprint'>>

choices.label: Head for the circled shelf.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='deep in the back archives a low locker has a keyhole shaped like silver anchor mark and no key; a row of dictionaries hides a narrow gap behind the binders, just wide enough for a hand'>>

choices.label: Reach into a narrow gap behind the binders.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the back archives are pitch black and the shelves feel endless; a wind-up lantern hangs somewhere to the left, or she could just push on by feel'>>

choices.label: Feel along the shelf for a wind-up lantern.
Keep going blind into the dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='her fingers close on a wind-up lantern; its beam shows a shelf marked with silver anchor mark ahead and a low locker tucked behind it'>>

choices.label: Cross to the marked shelf.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=115 beats='BOTTLENECK: whichever route she took, Priya finds the tarnished silver key wrapped in oilcloth, stamped with the founder's silver anchor mark; the folded cipher slip is tied to it; the tarnished silver key could open the founder's office, the sealed specimen case, or the maintenance stairs'>>

choices.label: Try the tarnished silver key on the founder's office door.
Try it on the sealed specimen case.
Try it on the locked maintenance stairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the tarnished silver key turns the founder's office door; inside, a battered rolltop desk and a faded photograph of the founder watch over a room untouched for decades'>>

choices.label: Search a battered rolltop desk.
Look behind the founder's a faded photograph.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a battered rolltop desk's pigeonholes hide a salt-stained notebook; its first page carries the same the folded cipher slip as the tarnished silver key, half of a cipher waiting to be read'>>

choices.label: Carry a salt-stained notebook to the chart table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='behind a faded photograph a shallow safe stands open and empty but for the decoder ring, the exact tool the folded cipher slip seems to need'>>

choices.label: Take the decoder ring to the chart table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the sealed specimen case holds the founder's expedition logs under stiff glass; the tarnished silver key fits the brass latch but the lid is jammed with age'>>

choices.label: Ease the sealed specimen case open.
Force the stubborn latch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='patient wiggling frees the lid without a sound; inside, a thin logbook is bookmarked at a page of coded lines'>>

choices.label: Lift out a thin logbook.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a thin logbook's coded page matches the folded cipher slip on the tarnished silver key; the chart table under a green lamp is the place to lay it all out'>>

choices.label: Spread a thin logbook on the chart table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='she leans hard on the latch and the old glass creaks in warning; ease off now, or give it one firm yank'>>

choices.label: Steady it before the glass cracks.
Yank it hard.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she breathes, lifts gently, and the lid gives; a thin logbook slides free with its coded page uppermost, ready to read'>>

choices.label: Settle in to read the code.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the tarnished silver key opens the maintenance stairs; the stairwell climbs into shadow, and a narrow locker sits at its base with something pale inside'>>

choices.label: Climb toward the landing.
Check a narrow locker at the base.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the landing opens onto the founder's old chart table, a green lamp still on it, and beside the lamp the folded cipher slip and the decoder ring'>>

choices.label: Sit at the chart table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a narrow locker holds a rolled chart and the founder's spare spectacles; a rolled chart is a page of code that begs for a quiet table'>>

choices.label: Take a rolled chart up to the chart table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=110 beats='BOTTLENECK: every route brings Priya to the founder's chart table with the folded cipher slip and the decoder ring together at last; under the green lamp she lines them up to read the first line'>>

choices.label: Read the first line of the cipher.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=115 beats='BOTTLENECK: the first cipher line resolves into a direction, follow the tide, and points to three named rooms that all ring the atrium; the Tide Hall, the Chart Room, or the Pump Corridor'>>

choices.label: Head to the Tide Hall the cipher names.
Head to the Chart Room.
Head down the Pump Corridor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Tide Hall glimmers with a painted wave mural; a spiral leads up toward the dome, and a service ladder offers a shortcut'>>

choices.label: Climb toward a painted wave mural.
Take a service ladder.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='under a painted wave mural a painted constellation matches the cipher's clue; a marked door beneath it opens toward the atrium at the Coral Bay Aquarium's heart'>>

choices.label: Take the marked door to the atrium.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='a service ladder rises to a narrow gangway high over the hall; a steady walk across leads to a service door, but the dark above tempts her higher'>>

choices.label: Edge across a narrow gangway.
Climb higher into a painted wave mural's dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she keeps her eyes forward and crosses a narrow gangway to a service door that lets down toward the atrium'>>

choices.label: Descend toward the atrium.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Chart Room is lined with charts; a great tide model stands on brass rails, and a giant bound chart book lies open on a slanted stand'>>

choices.label: Spin a great tide model.
Open a giant bound chart book.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='turning a great tide model to the cipher's latitude clicks a hidden catch; a low panel swings aside onto a passage toward the atrium'>>

choices.label: Step through toward the atrium.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a giant bound chart book falls open at a hand-drawn page the founder added; a route is inked across it in faded red toward the Coral Bay Aquarium's centre'>>

choices.label: Follow the inked red route.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the red route threads a back stair and a store room and comes out, exactly as drawn, at a door onto the atrium'>>

choices.label: Open the atrium's door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the Pump Corridor ticks with a hundred old clocks; one doorway leads to the pump room, another passes under a slow, heavy valve wheel'>>

choices.label: Follow the ticking to the pump room.
Cross under a slow, heavy valve wheel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='in the pump room the master clock's hands are set to the cipher's hour; nudging them true opens a maintenance door toward the atrium'>>

choices.label: Go through the maintenance door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='a slow, heavy valve wheel swings across the only doorway on a slow, steady beat; she can time her steps and slip under, or rush it while it is far'>>

choices.label: Time your steps past a slow, heavy valve wheel.
Rush across before it swings back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she counts the beat, waits, and walks through cleanly between swings; the passage beyond slopes down to the atrium'>>

choices.label: Follow the passage to the atrium.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=115 beats='BOTTLENECK: all roads meet at the atrium, where a great tide model of brass gears stands under the glass dome; the cipher says the founder hid his real sunken exhibit here; she can align a great tide model of brass gears, hunt the console for a panel, or check the night watchman's watch room'>>

choices.label: Align a great tide model of brass gears to the cipher.
Search the console for a hidden panel.
Slip into the night watchman's watch room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='a great tide model of brass gears's rings turn with a whisper; the cipher gives an exact setting, but the rings are stiff and easy to spin past'>>

choices.label: Set the rings exactly as decoded.
Spin the rings by feel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she sets each ring to the decoded mark; a great tide model of brass gears sighs, gears mesh, and a section of the marble floor slides back onto a hatch going down'>>

choices.label: Descend a hatch going down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='spun by feel, the rings clunk into a wrong pattern and a great tide model of brass gears groans; she can start over and decode it properly, or lean in and force the rings'>>

choices.label: Start over and decode it properly.
Force the rings into place.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she resets the rings, reads the cipher twice, and turns each to its true mark; this time a great tide model of brass gears opens the floor onto a hatch going down'>>

choices.label: Take a hatch going down down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the console under a great tide model of brass gears is carved with sliding tiles; one seam breathes a cool draught, hinting at a side door as well as a puzzle'>>

choices.label: Solve the little sliding puzzle.
Follow the draught to the side door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='sliding the tiles into the founder's silver anchor mark releases a catch under the console; the marble opens onto a hatch going down'>>

choices.label: Go down a hatch going down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the draught leads to a low side door the plans never showed; it opens on a dusty room crowded with half-built dioramas'>>

choices.label: Step into a dusty room crowded with half-built dioramas.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='this is the founder's private a dusty room crowded with half-built dioramas, sealed and forgotten, its benches loaded with unfinished automata and labelled wonders; not the sunken exhibit the cipher promised, but a marvel all its own'>>

choices.label: Take it all in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='the night watchman's watch room hums with old monitors; a watch log lies open on the desk, and a heavy black telephone sits within reach'>>

choices.label: Read the night watchman's a watch log.
Use a heavy black telephone.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a watch log's oldest entry, in the founder's hand, notes a hatch going down that opens under a great tide model of brass gears at the cipher's hour; she hurries back and the marble is already sliding open'>>

choices.label: Descend a hatch going down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a heavy black telephone still works; she could call for a lift home now, safe and sound, with the mystery half-solved and a story to tell'>>

choices.label: Call home from the Coral Bay Aquarium's desk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=120 beats='BOTTLENECK: a hatch going down opens on the founder's secret vault, shelves of donated treasures he meant the whole town to share but never lived to reveal; a sealed letter, an old salvage chart, and a decision, what to do with all of it'>>

choices.label: Read the founder's a sealed letter.
Study an old salvage chart.
Decide who to tell.
Grab something to prove it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='a sealed letter explains everything: the founder hid the sunken exhibit to protect it, and asks whoever finds it to give it back to the town; a last line points to one final resting clue'>>

choices.label: Follow a sealed letter's final clue.
Keep a sealed letter safe and leave the rest.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the final clue lifts a false shelf to reveal the founder's inventory, naming every piece and where it truly belongs; the whole mystery lies open in her hands'>>

choices.label: Read inventory to the end.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=100 beats='page by page inventory tells the town's lost history and clears the founder's name; by dawn Priya understands not just where the sunken exhibit is, but why it was hidden and how to give it back'>>

choices.label: Carry the whole truth up into the morning.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she tucks a sealed letter into her coat and leaves the treasures untouched; the founder's words feel like a trust she means to honour, carefully, in daylight'>>

choices.label: Slip out with a sealed letter and a plan.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='an old salvage chart marks a flooded wing where more of the sunken exhibit waits; she could follow it now, photograph it for later, or lose herself tracing every faded line'>>

choices.label: Follow an old salvage chart to a flooded wing.
Photograph an old salvage chart and go.
Keep tracing it as the sky greys.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='an old salvage chart leads her behind a plaster wall to a small sealed tank room the town thought lost forever; she marks the way and photographs each frame'>>

choices.label: Bring a flooded wing to light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she photographs an old salvage chart corner to corner and leaves vault exactly as she found it, evidence safe on her phone for whoever should decide'>>

choices.label: Head out with the proof.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='she thinks about who should know: the head biologist would make it right, her friends would keep it thrilling and secret, or she could simply leave it for the Coral Bay Aquarium to rediscover on its own'>>

choices.label: Wake the head biologist with proof.
Keep it a secret with your friends.
Leave it for the Coral Bay Aquarium to find.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she gathers a sealed letter and inventory and, at first light, meets the astonished the head biologist at the staff door with the whole discovery laid out'>>

choices.label: Hand over the founder's trust.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she decides vault will be the secret of her and her closest friends, a private wonder to visit and protect, at least for now'>>

choices.label: Seal the secret with a promise.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she leaves the founder's own an old salvage chart propped open on the night watchman's desk with a note, trusting the Coral Bay Aquarium to follow it and finish what he started'>>

choices.label: Leave the clue and slip away.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='a small crystal seahorse on the nearest shelf would prove everything in an instant; her hand hovers over it, and she weighs taking it against leaving it be'>>

choices.label: Slip it in your bag and run.
Set it back where it belongs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='a small crystal seahorse in her bag, she bolts up a hatch going down, but the shelf was pressure-set and a gentle chime of bells follows her all the way to the hall'>>

choices.label: Reach the hall with the bells ringing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='she sets a small crystal seahorse back on its velvet, deciding the truth is worth more than a trophy, and climbs out with only her notes and a clear conscience'>>

choices.label: Leave with clean hands.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the night watchman's torch finds Priya standing in the open; kindly but firmly he walks her to the lobby to wait for a lift, the mystery left for another day; safe, a little embarrassed, no harm done'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='The Curtained Tank Room's door clicks shut behind her and will not open from the inside; she settles on a bench to wait out the night, warm and safe, the founder's secret still hidden'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='blind in the back archives, Priya loses all sense of direction and decides to sit tight until the lights come on at opening; uncomfortable and dusty, but perfectly safe, a low locker unopened'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the glass cracks with a sharp snap and the noise brings the night watchman at a run; nothing is hurt but the case, and Priya spends the rest of the night explaining herself in the lobby, the folded cipher slip unread'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='high in a painted wave mural's dark the a service ladder ends at a bricked hatch; she climbs carefully back down and gives up the route, tired and dizzy but unhurt, the atrium still out of reach tonight'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='she rushes and mistimes it; a slow, heavy valve wheel bumps her back gently but firmly onto the safe side of the doorway, and she decides the Pump Corridor has beaten her for the night'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='forced too hard, the brass rings lock solid and will not turn either way; a hatch going down stays shut, and Priya sits by the silent globe to wait for morning, so close and yet stuck'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=90 beats='the ringing bells lead the night watchman straight to her; red-faced, Priya hands back a small crystal seahorse and puts everything right, let off with a stern word and a promise to return by daylight, the sunken exhibit safe and the lesson learned'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=90 beats='lost in an old salvage chart's every line, Priya looks up to find the sky already grey and the staff arriving; she slips out with the mystery only half-traced, promising herself she will come back and finish it properly'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='the founder's forgotten a dusty room crowded with half-built dioramas becomes Priya's quiet triumph; she photographs the automata, leaves everything untouched, and by morning tells the head biologist of a whole lost room, a wonder no one knew survived; a warm, satisfying discovery'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='with a sealed letter, inventory, and the whole truth, Priya walks into the morning and hands the founder's story back to the town; the lost sunken exhibit is found, his name is cleared, and the Coral Bay Aquarium will never be quite the same'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='Priya leaves with only the founder's a sealed letter and a promise to honour it; in the weeks that follow she quietly guides the head biologist toward the truth, keeper of a trust she chose to carry gently'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='a flooded wing of lost paintings is Priya's discovery to give; her photographs bring restorers and reporters, and the town crowds in to see what was hidden for a century'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=95 beats='at first light the head biologist listens open-mouthed, then leads a careful team down a hatch going down; Priya is thanked as the girl who gave the founder's gift back to everyone, exactly as he wished'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='the hidden vault becomes the treasured secret of Priya and her friends, a wonder they visit and guard together; it is theirs alone for now, a bond and a promise'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='Priya leaves the founder's own an old salvage chart open on the desk with a careful note; days later the Coral Bay Aquarium follows it, finds the sunken exhibit, and never learns whose small hands set them on the path'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='Priya calls home from the night watchman's desk and waits in the warm lobby for a lift, the mystery half-solved and safe in her notebook; not the full triumph, but a good night's adventure and a promise to return; safe and content'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='with an old salvage chart safe on her phone and vault left untouched, Priya slips out at dawn; she has proof enough to bring the right people back, and lets the grown-ups decide what happens next'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=85 beats='Priya leaves the treasures where they belong and climbs out with only her notes; she has not solved everything, but she has learned what she is willing to do and not do, and walks home wiser than she came'>>
